query:
SELECT s.id as sceneId, s.sceneIndex, s.mvSceneStatus as status, s.taskId, s.updatedAt,
  p.status as providerStatus, p.createdAt as logCreatedAt
FROM musicVideoScenes s
LEFT JOIN providerJobLogs p ON p.sceneId = s.id AND p.status IN ('submitted', 'failed')
WHERE s.jobId = 450002 AND s.mvSceneStatus = 'generating'
ORDER BY s.sceneIndex;
